hero.title: Quickstart
hero.description: Compile a prototype from source and evaluate it in three commands.

quickstart.title: Install and run
quickstart.description: Generate static output, then run the deterministic evaluator.
quickstart.code:
pnpm install
draftpine generate
draftpine eval --strict

cta.title: Next steps
cta.description: Read the primitive and layout catalogs to compose more routes.
